text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Super Creek's debut is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she brushes that aside to celebrate my debut
as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, remembering that she's the one actually
running the race, Super Creek sheepishly heads
out to make me proud.
